utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , I am ... I am Phoebe Buffay , hi !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am ... I am ... I am hoping to be your uterus for the next nine months .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You should know , that we are doing this for Frank and Alice , who you know , you have been there !

emotion_cause.span: 4_we are doing this for Frank and Alice , who you know , you have been there !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Umm , you know they want you so much , so when you guys get in there , really grab on .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , and ... and I promise that I will keep you safe and warm until you are ready to have them take you home , so ... Oh !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: And also , umm next time you see me , I am screaming , do not worry , that is what supposed to happen .
